channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Van Crashes Into White House Barricade, Driver Arrested, No Injuries Reported
item.description: Early on Wednesday morning in Washington DC, a van drove into a temporary security barricade near the White House. The incident occurred at approximately 6:30 a.m. local time at the intersection of Co...

item.title: Elizabeth Means’ Senate Experience Highlights Respect and Equality Issues for Women Athletes
item.description: Last March 3, Elizabeth Means, an American basketball player seeking Filipino citizenship to play for Gilas Pilipinas Women, faced an uncomfortable moment in the Senate when Senator Jinggoy Estrada as...

item.title: YouTube Launches Pilot Program for Deepfake Detection Among Public Figures and Journalists
item.description: YouTube has announced an expansion of its AI-powered deepfake detection tools, extending them to a select group of politicians, government officials, and journalists. The aim of this pilot program is ...

item.title: Zack Polanski’s Hypnosis Claims Re-examined Amid Apology Discrepancies
item.description: Zack Polanski, leader of the Green Party of England and Wales, has faced scrutiny over his past claims regarding hypnosis and breast enlargement. In 2013, Polanski, then working as a hypnotherapist, o...

item.title: Norwegian police arrest three brothers over minor blast at US embassy
item.description: Norwegian authorities have detained three brothers of Iraqi descent in Oslo over a bombing incident at the US embassy that occurred over the weekend. Fortunately, the explosion caused only minor damag...

item.title: Matt Canavan: Journey from Young Idealist to Nationals Leader
item.description: Matt Canavan, born in 1980 on Queensland’s Gold Coast, has navigated a career defined by both ideological exploration and practical responsibility. From a Catholic upbringing and early fascination wit...

item.title: Harambee Stars Coach Benni McCarthy Meets Midfielder Tyler Onyango in England Ahead of AFCON 2027
item.description: Harambee Stars head coach Benni McCarthy, together with FKF Deputy President McDonald Mariga, met Kenyan-English midfielder Tyler Onyango in Liverpool, England. This move is part of the Football Kenya...

item.title: India Condemns Attack on Thai Cargo Ship in Strait of Hormuz; Civilians Among Casualties
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) of India has strongly condemned the attack on the Thai-flagged cargo ship, Mayuree Naree, which was en route to Kandla port, Gujarat. The attack occurred in the ...

item.title: Senzo Meyiwa Murder Trial Resumes at Pretoria High Court
item.description: The trial of the five men accused of murdering South African soccer star Senzo Meyiwa has resumed at the Pretoria High Court on Wednesday, 11 March 2026. Meyiwa, who was the captain of the national te...

item.title: Rostam Azizi takes majority stake in Nation Media Group, vows to maintain editorial integrity
item.description: Nation Media Group (NMG), one of East Africa’s largest media houses, is set for new ownership as Tanzanian businessman Rostam Azizi acquires a controlling 54.08 percent stake through his company Taari...

item.title: Delhi High Court lawyers’ canteen serves only light refreshments due to LPG shortage
item.description: The lawyers’ canteen at the Delhi High Court has temporarily halted preparation of main course meals owing to a shortage of LPG gas cylinders. According to a notice issued by the canteen management, r...

item.title: Four dismissed police officers charged with robbery arrested in Cavite
item.description: Four former police officers who were dismissed from service were arrested in Imus, Cavite, for their alleged involvement in the robbery of a retired teacher in 2023. Police identified the suspects as ...

item.title: DSS Probes NEPC Officials Over Suspicious Finance Department Burglary Amid Internal Crisis
item.description: Operatives of the Department of State Services (DSS) don question many top officials of the Nigerian Export Promotion Council (NEPC) after one strange break-in happen for the council’s Finance Departm...

item.title: Iran Escalates Attacks on Shipping and Energy Infrastructure Amid Global Energy Concerns
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East are escalating as Iran has reportedly targeted commercial ships, key infrastructure at Dubai airport, and oil facilities, raising concerns about global energy security. Ira...

item.title: Irish Minister O’Sullivan visits Tanzania to strengthen bilateral cooperation and celebrate St Patrick’s Day
item.description: The Irish Minister of State, Christopher O’Sullivan, responsible for Nature, Heritage and Biodiversity, arrived in Tanzania on March 10, 2026, for an official visit aimed at strengthening cooperation ...

item.title: US Missile Strike on Iranian School Likely Due to Targeting Error
item.description: According to a report by The New York Times, the recent missile strike on an Iranian elementary school in Minab was likely caused by a targeting mistake by the United States. Preliminary investigation...

item.title: Senior Army officers deny mishandling of sexual assault complaint following soldier's death
item.description: Two senior British Army officers, Colonel Samantha Shepherd and Major James Hook, have formally denied charges following the tragic death of Gunner Jaysley Beck, a 19-year-old soldier who took her own...

item.title: Larry Madowo and David Ndii Debate Reasons Behind NMG Sale
item.description: Kenyan journalist Larry Madowo and economist David Ndii have publicly disagreed over the sale of Nation Media Group (NMG) shares by the Aga Khan Fund for Economic Development. Ndii claimed that NMG wa...

item.title: High Court Rejects Computer-Generated Legal Documents and Orders Manual Refiling
item.description: A High Court judge at the Milimani Law Courts in Nairobi has struck out a Notice of Motion Application and its supporting affidavit, saying they were generated by artificial intelligence instead of be...

item.title: Matt Timoko set to return for Raiders in Auckland clash against Warriors
item.description: Matt Timoko is poised to make his NRL return for the Canberra Raiders in round two, following a pre-season foot injury that sidelined him for the season opener. The experienced Kiwi centre, who was pr...
